title: More options for Kanban columns
excerpt: Our company would love the functionality of sorting our Kanban columns by People. For instance, an Art Director can use the Kanban view with columns sorted by Designer, and have an at-a-glance look at which projects are …

posts.author: cat.goliath (Cat)
posts.cookedHtml:
Our company would love the functionality of sorting our Kanban columns by People. For instance, an Art Director can use the Kanban view with columns sorted by Designer, and have an at-a-glance look at which projects are assigned to each person.

I am sure there are other columns that would be useful to sort by as well, rather limiting it to just Status types.

posts.author: kranthi_thoughtflow (Kranthi Kiran)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @cat.goliath ,

You can try out our app Multi Board Kanban. You can group Kanban using

  • Status Columns
  • People Columns
  • Dropdown Columns
  • Group

You can use this for a single board as a Board view or for multiple boards as a Dashboard Widget. Additionally, you can also see sub items of a board as separate draggable cards.

Do try out and let me know what you think.
